problems.diagnostic: named thing must be an expression with a type
problems.cause: AGREE requires port names to be valid expressions in contract statements, but the current syntax treats port names as if they were type names or property names
problems.minimal_edit: Replace each port name with a valid AGREE expression that refers to the port as a data value, e.g., use the port name directly as an expression

executor_steps: In the AGREE annex block, replace each port name in the guarantee expression with a valid AGREE expression that refers to the port as a data value
Ensure that all port names are used exactly as provided in the interface specification without any qualification or transformation
Verify that the guarantee statement correctly expresses that each input port value is preserved through the component
